message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title start EventLoop

participant "server.activeListener.OnAccept" as p1
participant "server.newActiveRawConn" as p2
participant "server.ContinueFilterChain" as p3
participant "server.activeListener.newConnection" as p4
participant "sever.activeListener.OnNewConnection" as p5
participant "sever.newActiveConnection" as p6
participant "network.connection.Start" as p7
participant "network.startRWLoop" as p8
participant "network.attachEventLoop" as p9

p1 -> p2
p1 -> p3 : 创建 filter chain
p3 -> p4 : 创建 connection
p4 -> p5 : 调用 activeListener 的处理新连接事件接口
p5 -> p6 : 处理新连接事件
p5 -> p7 : 连接启动
p7 -> p8 : 处理读写时间
p7 -> p9 : 保存 EventLoop

@enduml
```
